---
title: "Publications"
toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: true
---

<!-- 
  NOTE: This page fetches publication data and citation counts from Google Scholar.
  Results are cached locally to avoid repeated queries and slow load times.
  
  To update publications or citation counts (e.g. after a new paper is published
  or to refresh citation numbers), run 'quarto render' in the terminal, then
  commit and push the changes to GitHub.
  
  New DOIs must be added manually to the 'dois' vector in the R chunk below.
-->

```{r Download Scholar articles, filter and sort by year}
#| results: asis
library(scholar)
library(dplyr)
library(glue)

scholar_id <- "6rW2FGoAAAAJ"

pubs <- get_publications(scholar_id) |>
  filter(!is.na(year), year > 2018, journal != "") |>
  filter(!journal %in% c("University of Sussex", "")) |>
  arrange(desc(year))

dois <- c(
  "Repeated polyploidization shapes divergence in floral morphology in Lithophragma bolanderi (Saxifragaceae)" = "https://doi.org/10.1073/pnas.2505119122",
  "Greater Thermal Plasticity Toward Heterogeneous Range\u2010Edge Environments of Three Hypericum Species" = "https://doi.org/10.1002/ece3.73486",
  "Nectar and floral morphology differ in evolutionary potential in novel pollination environments" = "https://doi.org/10.1111/nph.19780",
  "The IDH-TAU-EGFR triad defines the neovascular landscape of diffuse gliomas" = "https://doi.org/10.1126/scitranslmed.aax1501"
)

years <- sort(unique(pubs$year), decreasing = TRUE)

for (yr in years) {
  cat(paste0("\n## ", yr, "\n\n"))
  yr_pubs <- filter(pubs, year == yr)
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(yr_pubs))) {
    p <- yr_pubs[i, ]
    full_authors <- get_complete_authors(scholar_id, p$pubid)[[1]]
    authors <- gsub("A Romero-Bravo|A Romero\u2010Bravo|Andrés Romero-Bravo|Andres Romero-Bravo", "**Andrés Romero-Bravo**", full_authors)
    doi <- dois[p$title]
    doi_link <- ifelse(!is.na(doi), paste0("  \n[Read it](", doi, ")"), "")
    cat(glue("{authors} ({yr}). {p$title}. *{p$journal}*, {p$number}. **Citations: {p$cites}**{doi_link}\n\n"))
  }
}
```
